completed_tasks.name: Scenario hardening
completed_tasks.progress: Scenarios 01 through 04 accepted on the device-shell baseline

completed_tasks.name: On-device operator integration
completed_tasks.progress: Scenarios 01 through 04 accepted on the OpenClaw path; Stage 3 closeout recorded

completed_tasks.name: Operator evidence indexing

remaining_tasks.name: Evidence publishing / consumption discipline and final closeout

blockers.description: Runtime restore on this ROM can require using Ghosthand's own runtime start control before /ping becomes available after reinstall.
blockers.workaround: Use the manual Ghosthand UI runtime-start path before assuming the local API is unavailable.

blockers.description: Working tree contains a large uncommitted delta spanning runtime fixes, docs, icons, license, and planning artifacts.
blockers.workaround: Resume from Stage 10 with repo truth from .planning artifacts first, then decide whether to commit the accumulated delta in slices or after Phase 10 closeout.

decisions.decision: Phase 10 Stage 3 is accepted for the first bounded OpenClaw scenario set and should not be reopened except for true regressions.
decisions.rationale: The accepted operator-path baseline, playbooks, runbook, evaluation, audit, packaging, and indexing layers are already recorded in repo-owned artifacts.

decisions.decision: Stage 10 is the final Phase 10 step and should define the canonical consumption/publishing model plus final closeout artifact, not more scenario work.
decisions.rationale: The remaining value is final repo-truth consumption and closeout, not additional meta layers or scenario expansion.

next_action: Start Phase 10 Stage 10 from the accepted Stage 3–9 repo-owned artifacts: define the canonical evidence consumption/publishing surface, classify canonical truth vs support assets, and write the final Phase 10 closeout artifact.
context_notes: Important correction when resuming: Stage 9 was completed as the indexing/milestone-summary layer. Stage 10 has not started yet, even though it was requested. Resume by treating Stage 10 as the final Phase 10 step. The phase trail should be advanced from Stage 9 in-progress to Stage 10 in-progress/closeout only when that work actually begins.
